changelog:
Add an optional complete request logging mode for inference debugging. The Web panel can configure retention and per-detail size, inspect/copy/download individual request details, and clear the detail store. Details include sanitized request JSON, visible and thinking output, token/cache metadata, account and endpoint attempts, and bounded stream timing. Credentials, authorization headers, image/document Base64, and raw tool arguments are never persisted. A new sudo-aware self-updater fast-forwards clean Git deployments, rebuilds Compose, verifies health, and automatically rolls back failures.
新增可选的完整日志模式，用于推理请求测试和故障分析。可在 Web 中设置保留数量和单条大小，查看、复制、下载单条详情并清空详情存储。详情包含脱敏请求 JSON、可见/思考输出、Token/缓存数据、账号与端点尝试以及有界流事件时间线；不会持久化认证凭据、Authorization 请求头、图片/文档 Base64 原文或工具参数原文。新增带 sudo 的 Git 原目录一键更新脚本，可自动构建 Compose、健康检查并在失败时回滚。
